name: NCA_GOV
description: NCA CSCC: cybersecurity strategy, risk management, IT project security, audit, and human resources security.

name: NCA_INF
description: Compute hardening, VM patch management, NSG enforcement, disk encryption, and Defender coverage.

name: NCA_PLA
description: Database public access, App Service/Function/API app hardening, storage encryption, subscription resiliency.

name: NCA_DAT
description: CMK encryption for databases and storage, private endpoints, secure transfer, SQL audit logging.

name: NCA_IAM
description: MFA enforcement, Entra ID administrators, guest account removal, custom owner role prohibition.

name: NCA_NET
description: Key Vault private link and firewall, SQL private endpoints, storage network restrictions.

name: NCA_SEC
description: Vulnerability assessment, adaptive hardening, Defender for Servers, ML workload security.

name: NCA_COM
description: Resource log retention, SQL audit retention, RBAC audit for NCA annual self-assessment.

name: NCA_DR
description: VM Backup, Redis secure connections, VMSS update compliance for RTO/RPO assurance.
